name: Agent Workbench
description: Local-first MCP runtime that gives coding agents bounded repository status, context, diagnostics, documentation, graph query, edit preview/apply, and validation-planning surfaces.

privacy.notes: Agent Workbench reads local repository evidence and returns bounded MCP responses. It does not send repository data to a hosted service.

resources.name: orientation
resources.description: Compact snapshot, freshness, trust, blocker, reuse, and detailed-resource orientation receipt.
resources.budget_policy: Uses bounded status evidence and returns no file inventory or source content.

resources.name: status
resources.description: Compact repository status, freshness, scope, and adapter coverage.
resources.budget_policy: Scans bounded repository file catalog evidence; no source mutation.

resources.name: scope
resources.description: Indexed roots, skipped roots, language counts, capability counts, and generated/vendor scope.
resources.budget_policy: Scans bounded repository file catalog evidence; no source mutation.

resources.name: overview
resources.description: Compact repository overview with platforms, key files, docs, validation hints, and first-call guidance.
resources.budget_policy: Scans bounded repository file catalog and docs evidence; no source mutation.

resources.name: docs-overview
resources.description: Compact docs overview with important docs, headings, warnings, truncation, and direct-read caveats.
resources.budget_policy: Bounded by optional scope_path, max_docs, and max_headings_per_doc; scans Markdown docs without source mutation.

resources.name: docs-map
resources.description: Bounded repository documentation map with paths, headings, warnings, truncation, and direct-read caveats.
resources.budget_policy: Bounded by optional scope_path, max_docs, and max_headings_per_doc; scans Markdown docs without source mutation.

resources.name: codex-integration-profile
resources.description: Codex feature, plugin, skill, hook, and update-path profile.
resources.budget_policy: Bounded static integration profile metadata; no repository scan.

resources.name: current-integration-profile
resources.description: Effective Agent Workbench provider profile for this MCP connection.
resources.budget_policy: Bounded connection identity and registered MCP metadata only.

resources.name: integration-health
resources.description: Compact Agent Workbench MCP integration health with configured, registered, discovered, and callable states.
resources.budget_policy: Bounded registry/profile/session metadata; no tool execution and no source mutation.

tools.name: context_for_task
tools.description: Use this before broad file reads, edits, or code review. Provide the task plus any known files or symbols; it returns bounded routing evidence, likely files, governing docs, risks, and suggested next Agent Workbench calls without mutating files.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded by max_files and max_docs; scans local file catalog only.

tools.name: diagnostics_for_files
tools.description: Use this for cheap static diagnostics on explicit repo files before or after edits. It reports provider-backed findings without running tests, typechecks, linters, or mutating files.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded by max_files and provider budgets; never mutates files or executes validation commands.

tools.name: docs_scope
tools.description: Use this to show, set, or clear the default docs scope_path for this MCP session before docs_search, docs_current_for_task, or section reads. It only changes in-memory session state and never scans or mutates files.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded in-memory MCP session state only; no repository scan and no source mutation.

tools.name: docs_search
tools.description: Use this to find canonical docs before adding or changing documentation, specs, contracts, or behavior. Prefer docs_scope or scope_path for active spec packages; results include bounded snippets and cursors for additional pages.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded by optional scope_path, max_results, and snippet limits; scans Markdown docs without source mutation.

tools.name: docs_current_for_task
tools.description: Use this before updating or promoting documentation to classify docs as current, supporting, non-authoritative, or uncertain for a task. Pass the task plus known files or a docs_scope/scope_path; it does not mutate files.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded by optional scope_path, max_docs, and local Markdown scan; does not mutate source or require Git history.

tools.name: docs_outline
tools.description: Use this after choosing a Markdown document, usually from docs_search, to get stable heading_id values before docs_read_section. It returns a bounded heading outline only, not full document text.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded heading outline for one Markdown document; reads no generated/vendor paths.

tools.name: docs_read_section
tools.description: Use this after docs_outline when exact documentation evidence is needed. Pass the heading_id from the outline; it reads one bounded Markdown section and avoids broad full-document dumps.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded by max_bytes for one Markdown section; reads no generated/vendor paths.

tools.name: check_markdown_document
tools.description: Use this before committing or promoting one Markdown document. It checks parser-aware structure, frontmatter, links, lists, and tables, returning bounded evidence without changing the file.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded by one repo-relative Markdown document, max_file_bytes, max_findings, and evidence byte limits.

tools.name: check_markdown_set
tools.description: Use this before docs-wide commits, spec closure, or documentation promotion to check explicit Markdown files or a bounded docs scope. Keep paths or scope_path narrow; it returns aggregate bounded findings without mutation.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded by explicit paths or scope_path plus max_documents, max_findings, file-size, and evidence limits.

tools.name: integration_health
tools.description: Use this to inspect integration health with optional caller-observed MCP discovery evidence; it reads registered and connection evidence and does not mutate files.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded caller-supplied discovery lists and registered MCP metadata only.

tools.name: symbol_search
tools.description: Use this before broad grep when looking for definitions, indexed symbols, or graph node ids. Search by name or identifier, then use returned node_id values with find_references or impact.

tools.name: find_references
tools.description: Use this after symbol_search or context_for_task provides a node_id, or when an exact symbol name is known. It returns bounded resolved and unresolved references with cursor pagination for truncated pages.

tools.name: impact
tools.description: Use this after selecting a graph node_id to estimate affected symbols and files before edits. It performs bounded indexed graph traversal, does not scan source broadly, and does not mutate files.

tools.name: preview_workspace_edit
tools.description: Use this before apply_workspace_edit to validate bounded full-file replacements. It does not mutate files; keep the returned preview_token and pass identical replacement text to apply_workspace_edit.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded to 20 full-file replacement edits and token TTL <= 1 hour; preview does not mutate files.

tools.name: apply_workspace_edit
tools.description: Use only after preview_workspace_edit. Provide the preview_token and identical full-file replacements; it mutates files only when the token, paths, hashes, and workspace-safety checks still match.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded to 20 full-file replacement edits and requires a matching preview token.

tools.name: verification_plan
tools.description: Use this before running validation commands or after edits. Provide the task and relevant files; it plans bounded typecheck, test, lint, docs, or smoke commands and optional static feedback, but never executes commands.
tools.budget_policy: Bounded by max_commands; never executes validation commands.
